steps.title: Set the function equal to 5
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=\frac{9}{7}x+\frac{8}{7}$. The condition $f(x)=5$ gives:
$$5=\frac{9}{7}x+\frac{8}{7}$$

steps.title: Check
steps.content: Substitute $x=3$: $\frac{9}{7}(3)+\frac{8}{7}=\frac{27}{7}+\frac{8}{7}=\frac{35}{7}=5$. This confirms the output is exactly $5$.
